combined_text: High speed, high resolution DLP 3D printer Titan 1 set to launch soon "April 8, 2014Inspired by an article ""A third industrial revolution"" from ""The Economist"" magazine, Tedd Syao started Kudo3D in 2012 aiming to make a perfect tool for anybody interested to explore the potential of 3D printer.
